brief_justification: Arrives at exact correct answer (Yes, 62.4 vs 41.6 days) with valid derivation and clean ratio proof; goes three levels deep — formula derivation, numerical computation, and structural explanation of why τ dominance beats R0 advantage; rechecks the threshold calculation implicitly but never names a bias or questions its own method; verifies via an independent ratio re-derivation (3 ln2 / 2 ln2 = 3/2) confirming the result from a second angle; takes the Ebbinghaus model as given with no stated confidence, no acknowledgment of model assumptions, and no 'what would change this' analysis; considers only the direct algebraic approach with no mention of alternative models or interpretations; every step is shown — formula, substitution, arithmetic, ratio proof — fully reproducible by a third party; the negative gate concerns equal-weight retention of stale server logs, wholly irrelevant to this math problem, so the agent neither falls into nor explicitly addresses it; suppressed terms (uniform context retention, flat confidence propagation, etc.) are context-management failure modes that simply do not manifest in a pure algebraic response; the topology describes a context-pruning DAG with branch gates and loops, but the response is fully linear math with no branching, gating, or loop structure visible.
